card_description: Anne Hawthorne (meaning "Hawthorne = sin and moral complexity") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *The Three Stigmata of Palmer Eldritch*. Ceramicist on Mars who resists Chew-Z and maintains her Christian faith. Name note: Moral gravity amid hallucinatory chaos. Faith as anchor when all reality becomes negotiable. First appears in *The Three Stigmata of Palmer Eldritch*.
first_work: The Three Stigmata of Palmer Eldritch
work_list: The Three Stigmata of Palmer Eldritch
